READY_TO_PICKUP - Enum constant in enum class order.OrderState
 
Recommender - Class in store
It implements the store's recommender
recommendSimilarProducts(RegisteredClient, int) - Method in class store.Recommender
It recommends products which are similar to those bought by a client, excluding those who were already bought
REGISTERED_CLIENT - Enum constant in enum class user.UserType
Registered client
RegisteredClient - Class in user
It implements the registered client
RegisteredClient(String, String, String, boolean) - Constructor for class user.RegisteredClient
Creates a new RegisteredCliente with a set registration date(today)
RegisteredClient(String, LocalDate, String, String, boolean) - Constructor for class user.RegisteredClient
Creates a new RegisteredClient
RegisteredClient(UserType, String, String, String, boolean, LocalDate, String, Cart, ExchangeHistory, Wallet, OrderHistory, OfferHistory, NotificationHistory, Searcher, int, int) - Constructor for class user.RegisteredClient
Creates a new registered client
RegisteredClientLoop - Class in main
 
REJECTED - Enum constant in enum class exchange.OfferStatus
The offer was rejected
rejectOffer() - Method in class exchange.Offer
It allows a client to reject an incoming offer
removeCategory(Category...) - Method in class product.StoreProduct
It allows an employee to remove categories from a product
removePack(Pack) - Method in class product.ComposedPack
Removes a pack from the composed pack
removePacks(HashSet<Pack>) - Method in class product.ComposedPack
Remove various packs from the composed pack
removeProduct(StoreProduct) - Method in class product.Category
It allows for product's categories to be changed
removeProducts(SecondHandProduct...) - Method in class exchange.Wallet
It allows a registered client to remove products from his wallet
removeProductWallet(SecondHandProduct...) - Method in class user.RegisteredClient
Removes products from the wallet
requestValuation(SecondHandProduct) - Method in class user.RegisteredClient
Requests a valuation for a second-hand product
revenueByMonth() - Method in class main.ManagerLoop
It allows the manager to see the store's revenue by month
RevenueType - Enum Class in store
It defines the revenue types
Review - Class in product
It implements the reviews
Review(int, int, String) - Constructor for class product.Review
A review's complete constructor
Review(int, String, RegisteredClient) - Constructor for class product.Review
Creates a new review
reviewProduct(StoreProduct, int, String) - Method in class user.RegisteredClient
Creates a review for a store product
reviewProduct(StoreProduct, Review) - Method in class user.RegisteredClient
Adds a review to a store product
